limitations: The formal kernel is boundary/basis-derived in this scaffold, not fully action-derived.
Coordinates are finite-basis implementation labels for sector-labeled states.
The coordinate tuple is basis-ordering-derived from sector labels.
The sector-labeled protected kernel is boundary/action-linked, not fully action-derived.
The full H_T theorem remains open.
The full topological index theorem is not proven here.
rules.statement: The protected kernel consists of one heavy (0,0) label in each charged sector.

limitations: Full chiral kernel proof remains open.
rules.statement: The protected labels carry the BHSM protected chirality chi=-1.

limitations: The complete internal action has not uniquely generated the full operator.
rules.source: v1.2 boundary functional and parent-action reduction
rules.statement: The v1.2 sector boundary functional supplies the lepton/up/down sector distinction.

limitations: Coordinates are implementation details; the sector-labeled subspace is the invariant object.
rules.statement: The finite Level 2 basis is sector-major, then chirality-major, then (k,j)-ordered.

evidence: I_U1 is necessary in the v1.2 parent-action reduction.
limitations: This is action-linked/scaffolded, not a full spectral proof.
rules.statement: The Higgs-selected U(1) boundary phase participates in selecting the protected chiral boundary channel.

limitations: The full topological index theorem is not proven here.
assumptions.statement: The protected kernel consists of one heavy (0,0) label in each charged sector.

limitations: Full chiral kernel proof remains open.
assumptions.statement: The protected labels carry the BHSM protected chirality chi=-1.

limitations: The complete internal action has not uniquely generated the full operator.
assumptions.source: v1.2 boundary functional and parent-action reduction
assumptions.statement: The v1.2 sector boundary functional supplies the lepton/up/down sector distinction.

limitations: Coordinates are implementation details; the sector-labeled subspace is the invariant object.
assumptions.statement: The finite Level 2 basis is sector-major, then chirality-major, then (k,j)-ordered.

evidence: I_U1 is necessary in the v1.2 parent-action reduction.
limitations: This is action-linked/scaffolded, not a full spectral proof.
assumptions.statement: The Higgs-selected U(1) boundary phase participates in selecting the protected chiral boundary channel.

theorem_scaffold.conclusion: If the protected sector labels, chiral boundary channel, v1.2 boundary functional, and Level 2 sector-major basis ordering are admitted, the finite formal-kernel coordinates are (0, 18, 36).
remaining_obligations: derive the full protected kernel from the complete twisted Dirac operator
derive the Higgs-selected U(1) kernel channel spectrally
prove the full H_T lower bound

title: BHSM v1.3N Formal-Kernel Action-Origin Scaffold
